title: Setting up column dependencies in Monday.com to filter options dynamically.

posts.author: Lamia (HATEM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am using Monday.com and have created a group to fill in information associated with different columns. I would like to know if there is a feature that allows me to add a dependency between two columns.

Specifically, I would like the options available in Column B to dynamically adjust based on the value selected in Column A.

Is there a native solution to implement this type of dependency? If not, do you have any recommendations (automations, integrations, etc.) to achieve this?

Thank you in advance for your help!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What are the column types? ie you could do an automation that when column A changes to ‘X’, then change Column B to ‘Y’. Monday also has some premade dependency automation recipes.
